phase3.prompt:
Write a program that:
1. Asks the user for a temperature (int)
2. Prints:
   • "Too hot!" if temp > 35
   • "Just right" if temp between 20 and 35
   • "Too cold!" if temp < 20
dialogueHints: Use if for temp > 35, else if for 20-35, else for < 20
Remember: else if conditions are checked in order.
Use Scanner to get user input.
